vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-

triage_decision.reason: The finding involves correcting file permissions on /etc/group-, a non-critical system file. The recommended chmod operation does not affect authentication services or network configuration and is unlikely to cause lockout or service interruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential overwriting of existing permissions if misapplied; Requires root privileges
